description_long: This lounge area is designed as a modern urban café or social space, featuring a central service counter with a menu board, display shelves, and a barista station. The room is furnished with several round tables, each surrounded by four cushioned armchairs, and two long communal tables with additional seating along the walls. Large windows line one side, providing ample natural light, while framed artwork or menu boards decorate the opposite wall. A spiral staircase in one corner suggests access to another level, adding architectural interest. The flooring is tiled in a muted blue-gray, complementing the neutral and wood tones of the furniture and fixtures.
description: A contemporary lounge with a central café counter, round tables with cushioned chairs, long communal tables, and a spiral staircase, all set in a bright, tiled room.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the lounge from the entrance, highlighting the service counter, round tables with chairs, and long tables along the windows.
description_view_1: View 1 provides a perspective from the back corner, emphasizing the spiral staircase, communal tables, and the arrangement of framed wall art.
description_view_2: View 2 centers on the service counter and menu board, with all seating arrangements clearly visible and the spiral staircase to the left.
description_view_3: View 3 looks from the opposite end, focusing on the entrance, the back of the counter, and the seating layout near the windows.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Each armchair has a single seat cushion and a single back cushion, both attached and medium-sized, arranged symmetrically around the round tables.
attribute_backrest_design: Backrests are straight, medium-height, and slightly padded, with a simple, modern rectangular profile and no visible tufting or segmentation.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on all chairs, straight, medium-height, and padded, matching the backrest style.
attribute_leg_style: Chair legs are short, straight, and made of wood or metal, with a simple, sturdy design; tables have central pedestal bases or four straight legs.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is solid-colored with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
